rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Tax Code §11.16, which governs exemptions for farm products. The two provisions address entirely separate exemption categories.
quote: Sec. 11.16. FARM PRODUCTS. (a) A producer is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the farm products that the producer produces and owns.
_note: No conflict; §11.16 addresses farm products exemption, unrelated to the homestead exemption in §11.13(b).
